ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., D(C), AM(CL)) */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" TEXT /* Market value of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player currently plays for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's home stadium */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the team */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators who attended the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the game */,
  "game_type" TEXT /* Type of game (e.g., league, cup) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_games" (
  "player_game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-game combination */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "crosses" INTEGER /* Number of crosses made by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of times the player was offside */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Number of clearances made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_games_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-stat combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total games played by the player */,
  "starts" INTEGER /* Total starts by the player */,
  "subs" INTEGER /* Total substitutions by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total red cards received by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Total number of shots on target by the player */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Total number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Total number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Total number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "crosses" INTEGER /* Total number of crosses made by the player */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Total number of successful dribbles by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Total number of times the player was offside */,
  "clearances" INTEGER /* Total number of clearances made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_ratings" (
  "player_rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-rating combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the player */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was given */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., coach, fan vote) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_ratings_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website URL of the league */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "player_position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-position combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., D(C), AM(CL)) */,
  "position_date" TEXT /* Date when the player played in the specified position */,
  "main_position" INTEGER /* Indicates if the position is the player's main position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_heights" (
  "player_height_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-height combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "height_date" TEXT /* Date when the height was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_height_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_heights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_weights" (
  "player_weight_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-weight combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "weight_date" TEXT /* Date when the weight was measured */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_weight_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_weights_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shots" (
  "shot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "shot_type" TEXT /* Type of shot (e.g., goal, assist, shot on target) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the shot was taken */,
  "location_x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the shot location on the pitch */,
  "location_y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the shot location on the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passes" (
  "pass_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pass */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "pass_type" TEXT /* Type of pass (e.g., accurate, inaccurate) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the pass was made */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the pass in meters */,
  "start_x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the pass start location on the pitch */,
  "start_y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the pass start location on the pitch */,
  "end_x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the pass end location on the pitch */,
  "end_y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the pass end location on the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pass_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passes_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aerials" (
  "aerial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aerial */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "aerial_type" TEXT /* Type of aerial (e.g., won, lost) */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute of the game when the aerial was won or lost */,
  "location_x" REAL /* x-coordinate of the aerial location on the pitch */,
  "location_y" REAL /* y-coordinate of the aerial location on the pitch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aerial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aerials_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_aerials_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "man_of_the_match" (
  "man_of_the_match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each man of the match award */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason why the player was awarded man of the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("man_of_the_match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_man_of_the_match_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_man_of_the_match_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_data" (
  "player_match_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player-match data combination */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game */,
  "shots_per_game" REAL /* Shots per game by the player */,
  "pass_success_percentage" REAL /* Pass success percentage by the player */,
  "aerials_won" INTEGER /* Aerials won by the player */,
  "dribbles_per_game" REAL /* Average number of dribbles per game by the player */,
  "tackles_per_game" REAL /* Average number of tackles per game by the player */,
  "interceptions_per_game" REAL /* Average number of interceptions per game by the player */,
  "fouls_committed_per_game" REAL /* Average number of fouls committed per game by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered_per_game" REAL /* Average number of fouls suffered per game by the player */,
  "clearances_per_game" REAL /* Average number of clearances per game by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_match_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_data_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_data_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
